title: PC→Android Sync: Voice Prompts & Tones — Toggle change on PC propagates after Bluetooth reconnect (Android app backgrounded)
steps: Precondition: Poly Studio Mobile app installed, device paired to both Android phone and PC (via BT700/USB). Voice Prompts & Tones screen open on Android app.
1. On PC (Poly Lens Desktop or Plantronics Hub): Navigate to Device Settings → Voice Prompts & Tones → Set 'Calls' toggle to OFF.
2. On Android: Press Home button to background the app (do not kill).
3. On Android: Force Bluetooth disconnect — Settings → Bluetooth → tap device → 'Forget' OR turn off phone Bluetooth.
4. Wait 5s. Reconnect: Turn Bluetooth ON → re-pair device.
5. Open Poly Studio Mobile app. Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → Voice Prompts & Tones.
6. Observe the 'Calls' toggle state.
expected: Expected: 'Calls' toggle shows OFF (synced from PC). Actual (If Bug): Toggle still shows ON — PC change was not propagated to Android app after reconnect cycle.

title: PC→Android Sync: Voice Prompts & Tones — Toggle change on PC propagates while Android app is in foreground (live sync)
steps: Precondition: Device connected to both Android (Poly Studio Mobile app open, Voice Prompts & Tones screen visible) and PC.
1. On PC: Navigate to Device Settings → Voice Prompts & Tones → Set 'Hold Reminder' toggle to OFF.
2. On Android: Remain on Voice Prompts & Tones screen. Do NOT navigate away. Observe the 'Hold Reminder' toggle for up to 30 seconds.
3. If no change observed: Pull-to-refresh or tap the sync icon (if available) on the Android app.
4. Note the exact trigger that caused the sync (automatic push, pull-to-refresh, or required reconnect).
expected: Expected: 'Hold Reminder' toggle updates to OFF on Android within 30s OR immediately after manual refresh. Actual (If Bug): Toggle remains ON — no live sync mechanism works from PC→Android.

title: PC→Android Sync: Voice Prompts & Tones — Multiple toggles changed on PC sync after app force-kill and relaunch
steps: Precondition: Device connected to both Android and PC. Android app in foreground.
1. On PC: Navigate to Device Settings → Voice Prompts & Tones → Set the following: 'Incoming Call' = OFF, 'Active Audio Tone' = OFF, 'Answering Call' = ON.
2. IMMEDIATELY on Android: Force-kill the app (swipe from recents). Do NOT navigate away or refresh first.
3. Wait 10s. Relaunch Poly Studio Mobile app.
4. Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → Voice Prompts & Tones.
5. Verify each toggle state.
expected: Expected: 'Incoming Call' = OFF, 'Active Audio Tone' = OFF, 'Answering Call' = ON (all synced from PC). Actual (If Bug): All toggles show pre-change values — PC changes lost because app was killed before sync trigger occurred.

title: PC→Android Sync: Voice Prompts & Tones — Dropdown option change on PC propagates after device power cycle
steps: Precondition: Device connected to both Android and PC. Android app open at Home screen (not in Voice Prompts & Tones).
1. On PC: Navigate to Device Settings → Voice Prompts & Tones → Set 'Answer/Ignore' dropdown to 'Tones Only'.
2. On Android: Do NOT open Voice Prompts & Tones screen yet.
3. Power off the device (hold Power button 2s). Wait 5s.
4. Power on the device. Wait for auto-reconnect to Android.
5. Open Poly Studio Mobile app. Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → Voice Prompts & Tones.
6. Observe the 'Answer/Ignore' dropdown value.
expected: Expected: 'Answer/Ignore' shows 'Tones Only' (synced from PC after device power cycle + reconnect). Actual (If Bug): Dropdown shows previous value (e.g., 'Voice & Tones') — PC change not persisted through device power cycle.

title: PC→Android Sync: Voice Prompts & Tones — Sync trigger identification (polling interval test)
steps: Precondition: Device connected to both Android and PC. Android app open at Voice Prompts & Tones screen.
1. Note current time T0. On PC: Change 'Calls' toggle to opposite state.
2. On Android: Do NOT interact with the app. Observe the screen continuously.
3. Record the timestamp T_sync when the Android UI updates to reflect the PC change.
4. Calculate delta = T_sync - T0.
5. Repeat steps 1-4 two more times with different toggles ('Hold Reminder', 'Incoming Call').
6. Determine if sync is push-based (instant, delta < 2s), polling-based (consistent delta ~5s/10s/30s), or reconnect-triggered (no update without disconnect/reconnect).
expected: Expected: Sync occurs within a consistent time window across all three trials, identifying the sync mechanism. Actual (If Bug): No sync occurs at all while app is idle on the screen — user must navigate away and back, or disconnect/reconnect, to see PC changes.

title: PC→Android Sync: Voice Prompts & Tones — PC change while Android app is closed, then app opened later
steps: Precondition: Device connected to both Android and PC. Poly Studio Mobile app is fully closed (not in recents).
1. On PC: Navigate to Device Settings → Voice Prompts & Tones → Set 'Calls' = OFF, 'Hold Reminder' = ON, 'Incoming Call' = OFF.
2. Wait 30s. On Android: Open Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → Voice Prompts & Tones.
4. Verify all three toggle states.
expected: Expected: 'Calls' = OFF, 'Hold Reminder' = ON, 'Incoming Call' = OFF — all synced from PC upon app open. Actual (If Bug): Toggles show default or previous values — PC changes not fetched on app launch.

title: PC→Android Sync: Voice Prompts & Tones — Asymmetry validation: Android→PC direction works but PC→Android does not
steps: Precondition: Device connected to both Android and PC. Both apps showing Voice Prompts & Tones screen.
1. On Android: Set 'Calls' toggle to OFF. Observe PC screen updates to OFF within 30s.
2. On Android: Set 'Calls' toggle back to ON. Observe PC screen updates to ON.
3. On PC: Set 'Hold Reminder' toggle to OFF. Observe Android screen.
4. Wait 30s. If no update, perform Bluetooth disconnect/reconnect on Android.
5. Note whether PC→Android sync succeeded after reconnect.
6. On PC: Set 'Hold Reminder' toggle back to ON. Observe Android screen again.
expected: Expected (Symmetry): Both directions sync reliably — Android→PC updates immediately, PC→Android updates within same mechanism. Actual (If Bug - Asymmetry): Android→PC sync works (steps 1-2 pass), but PC→Android sync fails even after reconnect (steps 3-5 fail) — confirming the reported bug scenario.

title: PC→Android Sync: Voice Prompts & Tones — All 6 setting items sync independently
steps: Precondition: Device connected to both Android and PC. Android app open at Voice Prompts & Tones screen.
1. On PC: Set all 6 items to known states: 'Calls'=OFF, 'Hold Reminder'=OFF, 'Incoming Call'=ON, 'Active Audio Tone'=ON, 'Answering Call'=OFF, 'Answer/Ignore'='Voice Only'.
2. On Android: Perform Bluetooth disconnect → reconnect.
3. Navigate away from Voice Prompts & Tones screen, then back.
4. Verify each of the 6 items matches the PC-set values.
5. On PC: Reverse all 6 items: 'Calls'=ON, 'Hold Reminder'=ON, 'Incoming Call'=OFF, 'Active Audio Tone'=OFF, 'Answering Call'=ON, 'Answer/Ignore'='Tones Only'.
6. Repeat steps 2-3.
7. Verify all 6 items match the reversed values.
expected: Expected: All 6 Voice Prompts & Tones items sync correctly from PC to Android in both directions (original and reversed). Actual (If Bug): Some items sync while others do not — indicating per-item sync implementation gaps or different sync behaviors for toggle vs. dropdown types.
